# MonitorOff

## Tags
share

## Categories
connectivity, devices

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/monitor-off)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MonitorOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MonitorOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
